page_title: Fullmetal Alchemist the Movie: Conqueror of Shamballa Original Soundtrack
text:
Fullmetal Alchemist the Movie: Conqueror of Shamballa Original Soundtrack is a soundtrack album containing music from Fullmetal Alchemist the Movie: Conqueror of Shamballa. It was released on July 20th, 2005 by Aniplex and the album was composed by Michiru Ōshima.

Notes

Tracks 6 and 46: composed and arranged by Ferenc Snètberger
Track 6: lyrics and performed by Tayo Awosusi
Tracks 1-5 and 7-45: composed and arranged by Michiru Oshima
